feature: Bulk Actions, Toasts Redesign, Tickets Details & Order Cancellation

frontend.details: Update the existing floating bottom island. Replace 'Export CSV' with 'Cobrar Masivamente'. Connect 'Imprimir Tickets' to a new `PrintQueueManager`. Connect 'Cancelar' to a new `BulkCancellationWizard`.

A floating glassmorphism card (bottom right) that tracks printing progress. It manages local state of `queue: Pedido[]` and `processing: boolean`. Uses a `for...of` loop with a small delay (300ms) between `generarTicketsAPI` calls to allow React to paint the progress bar. Includes a 'Cancelar' button that toggles an `abortController` flag. Once all API calls finish, it opens a single popup window concatenating the `getTicketHTML` of the processed orders.

A Radix UI Dialog. When triggered with `selectedPedidos`, it displays a carousel (using GSAP `x` transforms for sliding). For the current order in view, it shows the order ID/Client. Requires two inputs: `motivoCancelacion` (Select or Text) and `descripcionCancelacion` (Textarea). Validates with Zod. On submit, calls `cambiarEstadoPedido` with 'CANCELADO' and the new fields, then slides GSAP to the next order. Features a premium backdrop-blur background, large typography for order numbers, and spring animations.

Rewrite the `Toaster` configuration to inject premium CSS. Use `bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-2xl border-white/20 shadow-[0_8px_40px_-12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] rounded-2xl` for light mode. Add GSAP entry animations to toasts if possible, or rely on Sonner's native CSS animations but tweaked for a 'spring' feel. Typography must be `font-medium tracking-tight text-gray-900`.

Update the `@media print` CSS block. Add `@page { size: 58mm auto; margin: 0; }`. Ensure the container has `width: 58mm; overflow: hidden; page-break-after: always;`. Remove all shadows or rounded corners in print mode. Use standard thermal typography (monospace or strict sans, black/white).

Add a new section `Historial de Tickets`. Call a new API endpoint `getTicketsPedidoAPI` to fetch tickets. Render them as small cards showing the `codigo`, date, and a re-print button. Style them with subtle borders and a hover micro-interaction (scale 1.02).
Adapt the existing sheet or create a small modal `BulkChargeModal` that iterates over the selected orders and calls `cambiarEstadoPedido` with the selected payment method.

backend.details: Add `motivoCancelacion: { type: DataTypes.STRING, allowNull: true }` and `descripcionCancelacion: { type: DataTypes.TEXT, allowNull: true }`.

In `cambiarEstadoPedido`, accept `motivoCancelacion` and `descripcionCancelacion` in the `data` payload. Add validation: `if (nuevoEstado === 'CANCELADO' && (!motivo || !desc)) throw new AppError('Motivo y descripciĂłn son obligatorios para cancelar')`. Save these fields when updating the `Pedido` instance.

tasks: Run sync script to apply DB changes.
Update `TicketPrintTemplate.tsx` CSS for strict thermal formatting.
Create `bulk-cancellation-wizard.tsx` using GSAP for sliding between orders.
Wire up the 'Cancelar' button in the bottom island to this wizard.
Wire up 'Imprimir Tickets' in bottom island.
